title: Detection Registry
description: Catalog of credential / path / capability patterns consumed by hook guards. See .claude/docs/relevant-toolkit-hooks.md §11.

version.description: Schema version. Bump only on breaking field changes.

kind.description: credential = secret payload (token, header value, embedded URL creds). path = filesystem target (.env, ~/.aws/credentials). capability = sensitive command shape (docker exec, terraform show).

target.description: raw = match against full $COMMAND including quoted strings (use when the secret IS the payload). stripped = match against _strip_inert_content output (use when the secret is the target of a command).

pattern.description: Bash ERE regex. Must compile under [[ =~ ]].

message.description: Human-readable violation message. Hooks may prefix with verbs (e.g. 'BLOCKED:').

notes.description: Optional: known false-positives, accepted tradeoffs, or context that future maintainers need.
